Inquest	Report/	U.D.	Case
12.
Contents	of	the	complaint	/	statement	of	the	complainant	or	
informant:
IN	THE	COURT	OF	ADDL.JUDICIAL	FIRST	CLASS	MAGISTRATE	AT	NARAYANAPET.	Honored	Sir,	
The
brief	facts	of	the	case	are	that	on	15.09.2025	at	10:00	hours	the	complainant	Karni	Srinivas	S/o	Karni	Thimmaiah,
Age:	40	years,	Caste:	SC-Madiga,	Occ:	Private	employee	R/o	Madwar	village,	Makthal	mandal,	Ph.9440655712
came	to	Makthal	PS	and	lodged	a	Telugu	written	petition	in	which	he	stated	that	on	09.09.2025	at	11:00	hours	he
came	to	Society	Office,	Makthal	for	urea	and	took	information	about	urea.	While	returning	on	his	bike	on
09.09.2025	at	11:40	hours	before	the	office	on	NH-167	a	tourist	bus	belonging	to	HRIDDY	TOURS	AND
TRAVELS	br.no.AR01T-7055	its	driver	overtaking	a	lorry	beside	it	in	a	rash	and	negligent	manner	dashed	his	bike
by	which	he	received	severe	bleeding	injury	to	his	left	leg.	He	took	treatment	in	the	hospital	so	came	today	to	lodge
petition.	Hence	requested	to	take	necessary	legal	action	as	per	law.	
Received	on	15.09.2025	at	10:00	hours:	
As	per
the	contents	of	the	above	petition,	I,	SIP	of	Makthal	PS	registered	a	case	in	Cr.No.249/2025	U/s	125(a)	BNS	and
further	investigation	entrusted	to	B.Balram,	HC-693.	
Sd/-	
Y.Bhagyalakshmi	Reddy,	Sub-Inspector	of	Police,
MAKTHAL	P.S.
13.

Since	The	above	information	reveals	commission	of	offence(s)	U/s

CASE DIARY PART-II PS: Makthal I FIRNO: 249/25 circle: Makthal Dist : Narayanpet Statement of Sri. Kame Srinivas ·(madiga), OCC!- K. Thimaiah, age:-40 yrs, caste:- sc Private employee, R/o madwar village, makthal mandal, cell:- 9440655712 recorded by B. Balaram HC 693 of makthal PS on 15.09.2025 Did he make a statement during the investigation? Nari Madyar village, Muktal mandal, I went to the M Ac„ office in Makthal for Muria from my village on the morning of 09.09.2025 and did not find any information about Muriwagu. On the way back, I was on my bike Brino Te38 5773. On the way, on the morning of 09.09.25 at 11:40 am, a tourist bus bearing the number ARO1T 7055 overtook the lorry next to it and hit me very quickly and carelessly. As a result, my left leg was severely injured. Why did I not get treatment at the hospital today, i.e. on 15.09.25, I came and applied. Therefore, the bus driver made a statement that he was the one who was accused, and action should be taken. Ballam a ricer Investigation Ps Makthal.

It was a terrible accident (Srinivas called me and immediately went to Du-Patri and took me to the police station. Investigation officer ps makthal.

Three times 7B: 09/09/25580 550500 -40502 -25000 91:40hr P My brother was coming to the MPDO office in Tane on the falcon At1167 when a travels bus BrinD ARO1 T 7055 HRIDDY Tours & Travels Bus was driving very fast and carelessly and was going in front of the vehicle. Contents	of	the	complaint	/	statement	of	the	complainant	or	
informant:
IN	THE	COURT	OF	JUDICIAL	FIRST	CLASS	MAGISTRATE	AT	MAKTHAL.	Honoured	Sir,	
The	brief	facts
of	the	case	are	that	on	19.04.2026	at	12:00	hours,	the	complainant	Smt.	Jaya	Sree	W/o	Rajesh	Gouli,	Age:	52	years,
Caste:	Kshathriya,	Occ:	Senior	Public	Prosecutor	R/o	Ranaprathap	Singh	Colony,	Raichur	Town,	Karnataka	state,
Ph.9880343208	came	to	Makthal	PS	and	lodged	a	Telugu	written	petition	in	which	she	stated	that	on	18.04.2026
around	06:00	hours,	she	and	her	husband	Rajesh	Gouli	S/o	G.R.Babu	Rao,	Age:	57	years	and	her	husband’s	elder
sister	Rajeshwari	Hemanth	Navigere	W/o	Hemanth	Kamalakar	Navigere,	Age:	61	years	R/o	Pune	together
proceeded	to	Hyderabad	to	her	husband’s	younger	sister	house	on	her	husband’s	Car	(Ford	Company	Freestyle	Gold
colour)	bearing	no.	KA	32	P	3291	and	while	the	above	three	returning	to	Raichur	in	the	same	car	driven	by	her
husband	on	19.04.2026	around	01:30	hours,	near	Kachwar	Toll	gate	in	Makthal	mandal	on	NH-167,	a	dog	suddenly
came	across	by	which	the	car	overturned	and	dashed	the	divider	further	flipped	by	which	she	and	her	husband
received	minor	injuries.	But	her	husband’s	elder	sister	Rajeshwari	received	fractures	to	right	leg	and	left	shoulder.
And	the	total	car	was	damaged.	Immediately	she	and	her	husband	shifted	Rajeshwari	to	Govt.	Hospital,	Makthal.
Further	on	the	advice	of	doctors	shifted	to	Suraksha	Hospital,	Raichur	for	better	treatment.	Hence	requested	to	take
necessary	legal	action	as	per	law.	
Received	on	19.04.2026	at	12:00	hours:	
As	per	the	contents	of	the	above	petition,
I,	V.Achary,	SIP-II,	Makthal	PS	registered	a	case	in	Cr.No.127/2026	U/s	125(a),	281	BNS	and	further	investigation
entrusted	to	V.	Shankaraiah,	ASI.	
Sd/-	
V.	Achary,	
Sub	Inspector	of	Police-II,	MAKTHAL	P.S.	
Copy	submitted
W/Cs	to:	1.	The	Superintendent	of	Police,	Narayanpet	
forfavour	of	information.	2.	The	SDPO	Narayanpet	through
the	C.I.P.	Makthal	for	favour	of	information.
